title.en: China-to-Antigua and Barbuda Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入安提瓜和巴布达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入安地卡及巴布達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Antigua and Barbuda ABBS standards context, APUA grid-connection expectations, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and hurricane / salt-mist island deployment conditions — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与安提瓜和巴布达ABBS标准背景、APUA并网预期、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公共电网接口证据、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数以及飓风和盐雾海岛部署条件——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與安地卡及巴布達ABBS標準背景、APUA併網預期、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數以及颶風和鹽霧海島部署條件——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ABBS conformity determination, APUA grid-connection approval, customs determination, utility interconnection agreement, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards requirements, Antigua Public Utilities Authority connection conditions, OECS / CARICOM project specifications, customs documentation, and site-specific hurricane and marine-corrosion requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ABBS合格评定裁定、APUA并网批准、海关裁定、公用事业互联协议或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行安提瓜和巴布达标准局要求、安提瓜公共事业局接入条件、OECS / CARICOM项目规格、海关文件以及特定场址的飓风和海洋腐蚀要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ABBS合格評定裁定、APUA併網批准、海關裁定、公用事業互聯協議或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行安地卡及巴布達標準局要求、安地卡公共事業局接入條件、OECS / CARICOM項目規格、海關文件以及特定場址的颶風和海洋腐蝕要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Antigua and Barbuda, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming ABBS standards or conformity documentation requested for the shipment; (2) obtaining APUA project-specific grid-connection acceptance; (3) preparing IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, and IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence; (4) validating firmware for Antigua and Barbuda's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. China also uses 50 Hz, but China's nominal 220/380 V voltage is different and should not be treated as a voltage match. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are useful engineering background only and are not automatically accepted by ABBS, APUA, or project owners.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口安提瓜和巴布达时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认该批货物是否需要ABBS标准或合格文件；（2）取得APUA项目特定并网接受；（3）准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公共电网接口以及IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据；（4）针对安提瓜和巴布达230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证固件。中国同为50 Hz，但中国标称220/380 V电压不同，不应视为电压匹配。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准仅可作为工程背景，不会被ABBS、APUA或项目业主自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口安地卡及巴布達時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認該批貨物是否需要ABBS標準或合格文件；（2）取得APUA項目特定併網接受；（3）準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面以及IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據；（4）針對安地卡及巴布達230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證韌體。中國同為50 Hz，但中國標稱220/380 V電壓不同，不應視為電壓匹配。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準僅可作為工程背景，不會被ABBS、APUA或項目業主自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
